title: Loop A v4 hardening (skeptic 2026-06-11): DA validity gate, archetype classifier, phantom features, cs_spread discipline
why: Highest-throughput Loop-A day (14 proposals, 14 audits, 0 survivors, full measurement coverage) surfaced 5 process gaps: (1) TWO DA dispatches fabricated evidence (0 tool calls + invented file contents) and were invalidated by the orchestrator - sound both times but judge-judges-the-judge moral hazard; (2) the trend/meanrev archetype classifier is NAME-keyed (phase5_*meanrev*) - gameable in reverse to dodge the R:R>=2.5 floor; (3) phantom features: feature_overrides.add names that pass the B0155 registry check but come back not_in_tier2_skipped from the BUILT matrix (us_5y2y_z252/breakeven on G002/G006); (4) cs_spread_21 as universal narrative lubricant (6/6 proposals, signs flipping per cell); (5) linter_passed null shipped 6x.
scope: Mechanical DA validity gate: review with 0 tool calls AUTO-VOID before the verdict is read; invalidation ledger the skeptic diffs daily
Archetype classifier reads barrier_geometry_attestation/pseudocode, not module names
Feature-existence gate checks the BUILT per-asset matrix; not_in_tier2_skipped on a NARRATED feature = audit-voiding
cs_spread_21 sign convention pre-registered per mechanism class; cap <=50% of a batch on any single new feature
Lookahead linter commit-blocking (linter_passed must be true at proposal commit)
Formal DA re-submission artifact required for every BLOCK resolution (G004 gap)

G002-ETH retest path (pre-registered, NOT same-data): cs_spread MDA obligation first; if attributed, ONE new lineage on SOL H4 BEAR_QUIET or ETH after >=1 fresh OOS quarter, n_trials>=5, BTC-twin contradiction cited
recommendation: Before batch v4. Items 1-3 are S each; the ETH retest is its own gated slot.
